context: Muse should handle empty content paths by asking the user directly for personal context instead of skipping it.

checklist.name: detects-empty-context
checklist.description: Muse detects that all content paths are empty and no personal context is available

checklist.name: asks-user-directly
checklist.description: Muse uses AskUserQuestion to gather personal context directly, asking about what the writer is building, recent frustrations, and recurring ideas

checklist.name: uses-answers-as-context
checklist.description: Muse uses the user's answers as personal context, grounding topic ideas in real experience rather than generic trends

checklist.name: completes-full-workflow
checklist.description: Muse proceeds through web searches and presents topic ideas combining the user's input with trend data
